factual_basis.claim: `healthcheck --json` owns deterministic stable recovery / fallback-reconciliation semantics.
`launch smoke --json` may materialize approved-target activation evidence but must not pretend to own the deterministic stable recovery lane.
`selected_backend_snapshot` may be materialized or refreshed only by `sync --json`.

main_conclusion: The contour cannot truthfully mutate because its blocker crosses multiple owner lanes and no single contract-backed write command covers the whole blocker.
